name: touch-grass
description: Hourly break reminders with a calm pixel-art meadow. Rest your eyes, then get back to it.
author: mariotmc

touchGrass.enabled.markdownDescription: Master switch for break reminders. Turn off to disable Touch Grass entirely.

touchGrass.startAutomatically.markdownDescription: Start counting down as soon as VS Code finishes loading. If off, Touch Grass starts paused and you resume it from the menu.

touchGrass.breakDurationSeconds.markdownDescription: How long each break lasts, in seconds (default 300 = 5 minutes).

touchGrass.postponeMinutes.markdownDescription: How many minutes the **Postpone** button delays a break.

touchGrass.autoEndBreak.markdownDescription: Automatically close the break view when its countdown reaches zero. If off, the view stays open until you click Skip.

touchGrass.maximizeOnBreak.markdownDescription: During a break, maximize the editor and hide the side bar so the meadow fills the editor area, then restore your layout afterwards. Turn off to keep the break as a normal tab.

touchGrass.showStatusBar.markdownDescription: Show a live countdown to the next break in the status bar. Click it for the Touch Grass menu.

touchGrass.reducedMotion.markdownDescription: Slow the animation and reduce movement for a calmer, less distracting scene.

touchGrass.focusWindowOnBreak.markdownDescription: When a break starts, get your attention so it isn't missed while you're in another app: brings VS Code to the front on macOS, flashes its taskbar button on Windows/WSL, and shows a system notification on Linux. Best-effort.

touchGrass.syncAcrossWindows.markdownDescription: Share one break schedule across all open VS Code windows: a newly opened window joins the current countdown instead of starting fresh, and every manual action — take a break, postpone, skip, reset, pause/resume — stays in sync. Turn off to give each window its own independent timer.
